zh.Forcalquier,Alpes-de-Haute Provence,Fr: 法國巴希-阿爾培斯福爾卡爾
zh.Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Pr: 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾
zh.Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d: 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯阿維尼
zh.Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Pr: 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當GARSINDE (Gersende) de ALBON於大約1093年出生在法國巴希-阿爾培斯福爾卡爾時，她的父親Guigues De Albon V39歲，母親Mathilde19歲。她於1103年與Guillaume I de Forcalquier在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1160年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当GARSINDE (Gersende) de ALBON于大约1093年出生在法国巴希-阿爾培斯福爾卡爾时，她的父亲Guigues De Albon V39岁，母亲Mathilde19岁。她于1103年与Guillaume I de Forcalquier在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1160年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: ALBON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Alban
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jorge, Juan, Manuel, Alfonso, Alvaro, Jaime, Luis, Prudencio, Alberto, Andres, Guillermo.
English; Spanish (Albán): from the personal name Alban, Spanish Albán, from Latin Albanus, originally a habitational name for someone from any of the many places in Italy and elsewhere called Alba.
Galician (Albán): habitational name from any of the places called Albán in Galicia, Spain.

nameMeanings.name: GARSINDE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Gartside or Garside in Oldham, Lancashire, apparently so named from northern Middle English garth ‘enclosure’ (Old Norse garthr) + side ‘hill slope’ (Old English sīde).

variants.name: Gartside
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Garside  .

en.lifeSummary: When GARSINDE (Gersende) de ALBON was born about 1093, in Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, France, her father, Guigues De Albon V, was 39 and her mother, Mathilde, was 19. She married Guillaume I de Forcalquier in 1103, in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1160.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque GARSINDE (Gersende) de ALBON est née environ 1093, à Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, France, son père, Guigues De Albon V, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mathilde, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume I de Forcalquier en 1103, à Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1160.

de.lifeSummary: Als GARSINDE (Gersende) de ALBON um 1093 in Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guigues De Albon V 39 und ihre Mutter Mathilde 19. Sie hat 1103 in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich Guillaume I de Forcalquier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1160.

it.lifeSummary: Quando GARSINDE (Gersende) de ALBON è nata il circa 1093 nel Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Guigues De Albon V, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Mathilde, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume I de Forcalquier nel 1103, nel Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1160.

ja.Forcalquier,Alpes-de-Haute Provence,Fr: フランスバセス-アルペスフォーカルクイエル

ja.Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Pr: フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-デ-ハウテ-プローベンスフォーカルクイエル
ja.lifeSummary: GARSINDE (Gersende) de ALBONが約1093年にフランスバセス-アルペスフォーカルクイエルで生まれた時，父Guigues De Albon Vは39歳，母Mathildeは19歳であった。1103年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-デ-ハウテ-プローベンスフォーカルクイエルでGuillaume I de Forcalquierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1160年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: GARSINDE (Gersende) de ALBON(이)가 대략 1093년 프랑스 배세스-알프스 포캘키어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guigues De Albon V(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1103년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-데-하테-프로븐스 포캘키어에서 Guillaume I de Forcalquier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1160년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando GARSINDE (Gersende) de ALBON nasceu aproximadamente 1093, em Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guigues De Albon V, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume I de Forcalquier em 1103, em Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 1160.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда GARSINDE (Gersende) de ALBON родилась около 1093 г. в местности форкалкуиир, бассес-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Guigues De Albon V было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume I de Forcalquier в 1103 г. в местности форкалкуиир, алпес-де-хауте-провенс, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1160 г.

sm.ABT 1093–AFT 1160: e tusa o le 1093–ina ua ma'ea le 1160

es.lifeSummary: Cuando GARSINDE (Gersende) de ALBON nació aproximadamente 1093, en Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guigues De Albon V, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mathilde, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Guillaume I de Forcalquier en 1103, en Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1160.
